blueprint_json.questionTemplate: What is the sum of the first {{n}} natural numbers?

explanationRules.shortcut: If n is even, divide n by 2 first and multiply by (n+1) to speed up mental math.
explanationRules.common_mistake: Using n(n-1)/2 or forgetting to divide by 2.
explanationRules.interview_tip: This pattern frequently appears in 'handshake' problems.

blueprint_json.hintTemplate: Think about the formula for the sum of an arithmetic progression. What is n in this case?
